name: Converters & Generators
description: Client-side data converters and utility generators for developers, students, and everyday users.

tools.name: XML to JSON Converter
tools.description: Parse XML into JSON and back.

tools.name: Barcode Generator
tools.description: Create barcodes in formats like Code128, EAN, and UPC.

tools.name: Hash Generator (MD5 / SHA)
tools.description: Compute MD5, SHA-1, and SHA-256 hashes of text.

tools.name: JSON to XML Converter
tools.description: Convert JSON data structures into XML.

tools.name: HTML to Markdown Converter
tools.description: Convert HTML markup into clean Markdown.

tools.name: Markdown to HTML Converter
tools.description: Render Markdown into HTML with live preview.

tools.name: Color Converter (HEX / RGB / HSL)
tools.description: Convert colors between HEX, RGB, HSL, and HSV.

tools.name: CSV to TSV Converter
tools.description: Convert CSV to TSV and Excel-friendly formats.

tools.name: SQL to JSON Converter
tools.description: Convert SQL INSERT statements into JSON or CSV.

tools.name: Random String Generator
tools.description: Generate random strings and API tokens with custom charsets.

tools.name: JSON to TypeScript
tools.description: Generate TypeScript interfaces from a JSON sample.

tools.name: List Randomizer
tools.description: Shuffle or pick random items from a pasted list.

tools.name: Code Minifier
tools.description: Minify HTML, CSS, and JavaScript to reduce file size.

tools.name: Invoice Generator
tools.description: Create professional PDF invoices with line items, tax, and instant download — no watermark.

tools.name: IBAN Validator
tools.description: Validate IBAN numbers for Pakistan, EU, UK and 80+ countries with mod-97 checksum.

tools.name: Email Signature Generator
tools.description: Create a professional HTML email signature with name, title, contact, and brand color.

tools.name: vCard Generator
tools.description: Generate a downloadable .vcf contact card for phones and email clients.

tools.name: ICS Calendar Generator
tools.description: Build a .ics calendar event file for Google Calendar, Outlook, and Apple Calendar.

tools.name: Decision Wheel
tools.description: Spin a colorful wheel to pick randomly from your list — lunch, chores, team decisions, and more.

tools.name: Pomodoro Timer
tools.description: Free focus timer with 25-minute Pomodoros, short/long breaks, task label, and optional alerts.
